name: Deshur Law Firm, LLC
description_short: Chicago-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings for individuals and businesses, led by Managing Attorney Brian P. Deshur with 2,500+ cases filed.
description_long:
Deshur Law Firm, LLC is a bankruptcy law practice located in Chicago, Illinois, founded and managed by Brian P. Deshur. The firm focuses exclusively on helping individuals and businesses navigate debt problems through bankruptcy protection. Brian Deshur holds a J.D. from Loyola University Chicago School of Law with a certificate in Tax Law, and earned his B.A. in Neuroscience from the University of Pennsylvania. His career includes four years on Wall Street managing capital for small businesses and individuals, followed by legal work with the Legal Assistance Foundation of Metropolitan Chicago assisting migrant farm workers with labor law issues. He also spent two years at one of Chicago's largest consumer bankruptcy firms where he was solely responsible for Chapter 13 Plan confirmations in Rockford and Lake County.

The firm provides comprehensive bankruptcy representation for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, with particular strength in consumer debt cases. Brian has filed over 2,500 Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy petitions throughout his career. The firm also offers litigation services, having litigated over a dozen adversary proceedings on behalf of clients against creditor demands. Additionally, Brian has represented creditors in major Chapter 11 bankruptcies including Circuit City, Radio Shack, MF Global, and the Chicago Tribune, demonstrating experience across multiple bankruptcy practice areas.

Deshur Law Firm distinguishes itself through multilingual service capabilities—Brian is fluent in Spanish and has appeared multiple times on Spanish-language radio offering consumer debt advice to Illinois and Southeastern Wisconsin residents. The firm operates across multiple jurisdictions, with Brian licensed to practice in Illinois, Arizona, the Northern District of Illinois, District of Arizona, Eastern District of Wisconsin, Southern District of New York (pro hac vice), and Northern District of Texas (pro hac vice). The firm offers free consultations by phone at (312) 380-1564.

This is a specialized legal practice, not a debt settlement or credit repair firm. Bankruptcy filing requires legal representation, and while the firm's extensive case volume suggests capability, consumers should understand that bankruptcy is a formal legal process with significant long-term credit implications. The firm's focus on bankruptcy means it does not offer debt consolidation, settlement negotiation, or credit repair services.
pros: Managing attorney has filed over 2,500 Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy petitions
Extensive litigation experience with 12+ adversary proceedings fought on client behalf against creditors
Multilingual service in Spanish with prior experience serving migrant workers and Spanish-language radio audience
Licensed across 7 jurisdictions including federal districts, enabling multi-state representation
Tax Law certificate from law school, providing specialized knowledge for complex bankruptcy situations
Experience representing both debtors and creditors, providing deep understanding of bankruptcy process from multiple angles
cons: Bankruptcy is a serious legal remedy with severe long-term credit impact lasting 7-10 years on credit report
No indication of pricing, retainer fees, or payment plan options on website
Practice appears to be single-attorney firm (Brian Deshur only), potentially limiting availability and capacity
Website does not provide client testimonials, case results, or success metrics
No information about turnaround time, process timeline, or what to expect post-filing
best_for: Illinois and Wisconsin residents with significant unsecured debt seeking Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 protection
Spanish-speaking consumers in Illinois and Southeastern Wisconsin needing bankruptcy representation
Small business owners and individuals facing complex bankruptcy situations requiring federal district court filings
Debtors being aggressively pursued by creditors who need litigation advocacy in adversary proceedings
diagnosis: Deshur Law Firm is best for individuals or small business owners in Illinois, Arizona, or Wisconsin who have substantial debt and need formal bankruptcy protection through Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 filing. The main caveat is that bankruptcy is a serious legal process with lasting credit consequences; it should only be pursued after exploring other debt solutions, and consumers must understand that filing requires professional legal representation and involves court procedures.
services: Chapter 7 bankruptcy petition filing and representation
Chapter 13 bankruptcy petition filing and representation
Multi-state bankruptcy representation across federal districts
Creditor negotiations and defense against unreasonable creditor demands
Complex bankruptcy cases involving tax law considerations
Chapter 11 bankruptcy representation for businesses (creditor and debtor side)
